overview.name: Repeat Http
overview.description:
This scenario verifies repeated execution of HTTP requests.
Test flow includes: 1. Execute POST request inside repeat block. 2. Repeat request execution multiple times using variation file. 3. Validate POST response for each iteration. 4. Extract created entity ID for each iteration. 5. Send GET request for each created entity. 6. Validate GET response for each iteration.
This scenario validates: - Repeat command execution - Multiple HTTP request executions - Data-driven repeated POST/GET flow - Response validation for each iteration

repeat.comment: Execute HTTP create/get flow multiple times

http.comment: Step 1-2. Execute POST request within repeat

var.comment: Extract created entity id for current iteration
var.name: entityId

http.comment: Step 3. Validate response for each iteration
